title: pigea vernonii subsp. scabra
intro: Pigea vernonii subsp. scabra, also known as Vernon's pigeonwings, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pigea vernonii subsp. scabra include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
